pr.title: MDLM Diffusion — val_var_bpb 0.9901, EOS learning + full dataset shard rotation, 33M params, 1x AWS A10G

output.summary: Anchors diffusion with never-masked EOS and distinct PAD plus shard-rotation loading to train MDLM on the full FineWeb dataset within RAM limits.
techniques: EOS token kept visible and PAD excluded from diffusion masking/loss
ShardedDataLoader rotates 4-shard groups using preallocated buffers to cover all 80 shards
Head-count sweep shows bidirectional diffusion BPB remains invariant so hardware-aligned configs suffice
